nasb.text: You shall become a horror, a proverb, and a taunt among all the people where the Lord drives you.

esv.text: And you shall become a horror, a proverb, and a byword among all the peoples where the Lord will lead you away.

cnv.text: 在耶和華要領你去的各民族中，你必成為使人驚駭、使人嘲笑和諷刺的對象。

ccb.text: “在耶和华驱逐你们去的列国，你们的下场将很可怕，受尽嘲笑和讥讽。
